description: Celebrate Waitangi Day with this customizable template. This  template is the perfect way to share events, promotions, and traditions. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
